resources.string: Background step tracking, offline sync, and the live squat + push-up detector in one dark dashboard.
Open the camera detector for squats and push-ups when you want rep counting.
Your finished walking and running sessions will appear here, even when they were tracked offline.
Line up your full body in the frame
Stand upright for squats or rotate sideways into a plank for push-ups. Keep shoulders, hips, knees and ankles visible.
Angles will appear here once a pose is detected.
Camera access is required to detect exercise reps.
This device camera could not be started for live rep detection.
Use Auto for mixed sessions, or lock Squat / Push-up mode when one exercise is not being picked up correctly.
Start background tracking to collect steps, pace, heart rate, and offline history.
Tracking in background. You can leave this screen and steps will keep updating.
Tracking stopped. Unsynced sessions stay local until the internet comes back.
Start moving to begin counting steps.
Waiting for movement. Keep the phone in your pocket or hand for cleaner counting.
Walking pace detected. Cadence, distance, and calories are updating live.
Running pace detected. Tracking stays active in the background while you move.
Activity recognition permission is required for background step tracking.
Keeps steps running in the background and syncs sessions when the internet returns.
Allow background activity when prompted so step tracking keeps running with the screen off.
